name: CRM to E-Commerce Customer Sync
description: Publishes customer profile update events from CRM to E-Commerce Platform via Kafka to keep customer records synchronised.

name: E-Commerce to Analytics Order Events
description: Streams order placed and order completed events from E-Commerce Platform to Analytics Dashboard for real-time reporting.

name: CRM to Analytics Contact Events
description: Publishes CRM contact and lead events to Analytics Dashboard for pipeline reporting.

name: Mobile App to E-Commerce API
description: REST API integration allowing the Mobile App to browse products, manage cart, and place orders via E-Commerce Platform.

name: Warehouse to Inventory Batch Sync
description: Nightly batch file transfer of stock levels from Warehouse Management System to legacy Inventory Management. Conditional — to be decommissioned when IMS is fully retired.

name: E-Commerce to Payment Gateway
description: Synchronous REST API call from E-Commerce Platform to Payment Gateway Integration for payment authorisation at checkout.

name: E-Commerce to Warehouse Order Fulfilment Events
description: Publishes order paid events from E-Commerce to Warehouse Management System to trigger pick, pack, and dispatch.

name: E-Commerce to Promotions Service API
description: REST API call from E-Commerce to Promotions Service to validate and apply discount codes at checkout.

name: Analytics to Data Lake Streaming
description: Continuous streaming of analytics events from Analytics Dashboard to Data Lake Platform for long-term retention and ML feature store.

name: Mobile App to CRM Customer API
description: REST API allowing the Mobile App to read and update customer profile information held in the CRM System.
